title: gomphandra quadrifida var. triplinervis
intro: Gomphandra quadrifida var. triplinervis, also known as the White Flash or Triplinerved Gomphandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. It is a climbing or scrambling shrub native to tropical Asia, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Gomphandra quadrifida var. triplinervis include tea, tincture, and poultice, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
